JURY ARTHUR GROZA; C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. A STIPULATION REACHED AND READ INTO THE RECORD IN FAVOR OF THE PLTF. A STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR JUDGMENT FILED. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCRACKEN, WILLIAM MCCRACKEN, ROSALIND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERCO, PAUL PERCO, DIANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 6935 CALIFORNIA ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $11,129.95 RENT, $1,833.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $297.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,260.45, LEASE FORFEITED, 6/22/93 - CLERK'S NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED.
